name: Princess Grace's Ratatouille Nicoise
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped vegetables (zucchini, eggplant, onion, yellow pepper, red pepper, garlic) to the pan and stir until they begin to soften.
3. Cook the vegetables together, stirring occasionally, until all are well-cooked and tender.
4. Season with basil, laurel, thyme, salt, and pepper to taste.
5. Serve hot or cold. Serves 4.
